# Ideal Profile

* Ideal Candidate Profile (ICP) = structured representation of common traits from top candidates
* Generated by analyzing multiple good candidates (resumes + metadata)
* Use LLM to extract shared patterns (skills, experience range, education, keywords)
* Do not pass full resumes → use summarized/structured data
* Output should be structured (JSON format)
* ICP is converted into:
  * filters (experience, location, education)
  * embedding (skills + summary)
* Used as query input for vector search
* Enables consistent and scalable candidate retrieval
* Better than manual queries → data-driven and repeatable
